form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run favourite; scored a big 3 len win at Dongara Rtg 62+ April 4 over 1100m defeating Talking Heads with 61kg at $1.75. The race before that led but faded 3rd of 12 at this track Rtg 70+ on February 28 over 1217m, 3 len behind On The Mark with 56kg at $8. No reason why he can't repeat the dose.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Comes off a 61 day let-up. At the latest run ran last of 10 at Ascot Rtg 66+ on February 7 over 1400m, 23 len behind Fancy Red with 56kg at $26. Before that ran last in a small field at this track Rtg 70+ on December 27 over 1400m, 5 len behind Be Seated with 61kg at $5. He's a track and trip winner in the past and can bounce back to his best.

form.formComment: Most recently ran last of 12 at Ascot 0Mwly on March 14 over 1200m, 11 len behind Urquharts Bluff with 59kg at $41. The run before that raced on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 12 at this track Rtg 70+ on February 28 over 1217m, 7 len behind On The Mark carrying 60kg at $11. Tested again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide throughout. Hung outwards throughout.
Making the turn at the 800m inclined to hang out.
Began awkwardly. Raced wide for the majority.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 9 at this track Rtg 68+ on March 13 over 1400m, 1.1 len behind Snippety Legend carrying 58.5kg at $9. The run before that raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 12 at this track Rtg 70+ on February 28 over 1217m, 0.8 len behind On The Mark carrying 54kg at $5. Can sit on the speed and take catching.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping. Lay outwards under pressure in the straight.
Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.
Raced keenly through the early stages.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of five months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation tenth of 13 at Ascot 0Mwly November 1 over 1200m, 8 len behind The Calabrese with 56.5kg at $26. Previously first up; third of 10 at Bunbury 0Mwly June 11 over 1000m, soft track; 1.4 len behind Haida Gwaii carrying 55kg at $7.50. Fitter for a trial coming into this and she can play a leading role.

form.formComment: At the latest run won by 0.9 len at this track Rtg 58+ March 13 over 1100m defeating Undercover Sniper with 57kg at $10. The race before that ran last of 7 at this track Rtg 68+ on February 19 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Onemoretwomany with 55kg at $13. Good win last time out and he can go on with the job.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after eight months came from midfield; 2nd of 7 at Dongara Rtg 62+ on April 4 over 1100m, 3 len behind Prince Ragnar carrying 56.5kg at $8. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at Leinster Lein Spr 64+ on October 19 2024 over 1400m, 12 len behind Startthefriar carrying 55kg at $6.50. Good return but prepared to risk this time.
